narrative.description: Rare's N64 FPS adapts the Bond film into mission-based stealth-shooter levels with objective variety, reactive guard AI, and split-screen multiplayer that defined console shooters.
narrative.core_loop: Infiltrate missions, complete primary and optional objectives, manage ammo and gadgets, and escape before alarms escalate enemy response.

mechanics.map_notes: Missions unlock sequentially with difficulty tiers adding extra objectives.
mechanics.expression: Missions unlock sequentially with difficulty tiers adding extra objectives.

mechanics.map_notes: Guards react to noise, sightlines, and alarm triggers altering enemy placement.
mechanics.expression: Guards react to noise, sightlines, and alarm triggers altering enemy placement.

mechanics.map_notes: Facility and Caverns stages require precision jumps from a first-person view.
mechanics.expression: Facility and Caverns stages require precision jumps from a first-person view.

mechanics.map_notes: Free look aiming independent of movement direction.
mechanics.expression: Free look aiming independent of movement direction.

mechanics.map_notes: Weapons fire on trigger pull with per-gun handling differences.
mechanics.expression: Weapons fire on trigger pull with per-gun handling differences.

mechanics.map_notes: Armor and health deplete from enemy fire; medkits restore pools.
mechanics.expression: Armor and health deplete from enemy fire; medkits restore pools.

mechanics.map_notes: Turret lanes, mines, and timed escapes constrain routes.
mechanics.expression: Turret lanes, mines, and timed escapes constrain routes.

mechanics.map_notes: Secret areas and bonus objectives unlock cheats and content.
mechanics.expression: Secret areas and bonus objectives unlock cheats and content.

mechanics.map_notes: Mission failure restarts the stage from the briefing.
mechanics.expression: Mission failure restarts the stage from the briefing.

mechanics.map_notes: Boss fights like Trevelyan follow arena-specific patterns.
mechanics.expression: Boss fights like Trevelyan follow arena-specific patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Cradle climax spans multiple vertical combat phases.
mechanics.expression: Cradle climax spans multiple vertical combat phases.

mechanics.map_notes: Guards pause to aim before firing visible tracer rounds.
mechanics.expression: Guards pause to aim before firing visible tracer rounds.

mechanics.map_notes: Some missions checkpoint after completing sub-objectives.
mechanics.expression: Some missions checkpoint after completing sub-objectives.

mechanics.map_notes: Slappers and knife kills offer silent takedown options.
mechanics.expression: Slappers and knife kills offer silent takedown options.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience GoldenEye 007 through its core shooter loop.
